ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_ground_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's home ground */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo image */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_ground_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_ground_id") REFERENCES grounds ("ground_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grounds" (
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground */,
  "ground_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the ground is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the ground is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ground */,
  "ground_type" TEXT /* Type of ground (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground where the match was played */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., home win, away win, draw) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, tournament) */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss-winning team (e.g., bat, bowl) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_ground_id FOREIGN KEY ("ground_id") REFERENCES grounds ("ground_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_team_wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets lost by the home team */,
  "away_team_wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets lost by the away team */,
  "man_of_the_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the man of the match */,
  "mom_reason" TEXT /* Reason for awarding the man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_man_of_the_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., fast, spin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "bowling_average" REAL /* Bowling average of the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score by the player */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "catches_taken" INTEGER /* Catches taken by the player in the match */,
  "runouts" INTEGER /* Runouts by the player in the match */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Stumpings by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the league started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the league ended (if applicable) */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the league */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, team manager, fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home matches won */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away matches won */,
  "home_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of home matches played */,
  "away_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of away matches played */,
  "home_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of home matches won */,
  "away_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of away matches won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season or year of the performance data */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home matches won in the season */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away matches won in the season */,
  "home_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of home matches played in the season */,
  "away_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of away matches played in the season */,
  "home_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of home matches won in the season */,
  "away_win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of away matches won in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the umpire */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the umpire */,
  "umpiring_experience" INTEGER /* Years of umpiring experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "third_umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third umpire */,
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_referee_id") REFERENCES match_referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_third_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the match referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the match referee */,
  "refereeing_experience" INTEGER /* Years of refereeing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
